name: enable-account-cloud-sync
title: Enable production account cloud sync
description: Connect the verified optional account system to the existing Supabase Free project, update production configuration and release checks, then deploy and validate GitHub Pages.
scope: Supabase migration and auth URLs, public browser configuration, Service Worker cache version, release contracts, verification, and Pages deployment.
notes: Pages run 30004100490 succeeded; live v32 restored the real signed-in session and reported synced.
